block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: While Google is dealing with lawsuits over an advertising monopoly, its parent company Alphabet has announced a 20-for-1 stock split that will take effect after the markets close on July 15. The share price fell sharply on Monday and bounced back by Thursday.
block_07: The share price rose sharply on Wednesday, May 25, mainly due to purchases by large investors – plus 15% for the week. What's next?
block_10: The stocks plunged 43% on Tuesday after surprising the market with a guidance cut – the company's shares are currently trading below $16.
